title: A sponsored spouse or common-law partner in Canada needs a work permit - Canada.ca
content:
## You need a work permit
If you’re in Canada and being sponsored for permanent residence as a spouse or common-law partner (through the family class), you need a work permit to work in Canada.
You can apply for an open work permit .
How to apply for this work permit

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
